case_title: CHRISTINA M NUNEZ VS. ANTONIO C SANTANA

docket_entries.description: MADE BY RESTRAINED PARTY. RESP MUST BE PERSONALLY SERVED SINCE ORDER DIFFER FROM TRO. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797. MUNICATIONS
